description: You are the municipal clerk for the City of Oakridge. An urban planner has drafted an ordinance to amend the city's zoning code regarding Accessory Dwelling Units (ADUs). The draft is open in Calligra Words at /home/ga/Documents/draft_adu_ordinance.odt. The planner used shorthand annotations: additions are wrapped in '++' and deletions are wrapped in '--'. Format the document into proper legislative markup by converting these markers to underline and strikethrough formatting (removing the symbols) and applying the structural paragraph formatting specified in /home/ga/Desktop/ordinance_formatting_rules.txt. Save the document when complete.
